faqs.question: What does general pest control service include in Briarwood?
faqs.answer: Our general pest control service covers treatment and prevention for common household pests including cockroaches, ants, spiders, silverfish, mice, and rats. We perform interior and exterior inspections, apply targeted treatments, seal entry points, and provide follow-up visits as needed to ensure complete elimination.

faqs.question: Why does the price range from $175 to $300?
faqs.answer: Pricing depends on your property size, the severity of infestation, and treatment frequency needed. A small apartment with minor ant activity typically costs around $175, while larger homes or properties with multiple pest issues may reach $300. We provide free estimates and transparent pricing before any work begins.

faqs.question: How quickly can you service my Briarwood property?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day service throughout Briarwood and surrounding Queens neighborhoods. Emergency pest situations receive priority scheduling. Most routine appointments can be booked within 24-48 hours at a time convenient for you.

faqs.question: Are your treatments safe for children and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. We use EPA-approved products and family-safe application methods throughout all our Briarwood services. Our technicians are trained in low-toxicity treatments and will provide specific safety instructions. Most treatments allow re-entry within 2-4 hours, and pet-friendly options are always available.
